target.name: PHLX Semiconductor Sector Index
target.coverage_note: Build-time contract snapshot. The deployment workflow replaces this file with direct SEC issuer facts.

source_policy: Build-time empty contract. Production deployment replaces this payload using annual SEC 10-K Companyfacts.

calculation_policy.free_cash_flow: operating cash flow - absolute capital expenditures
calculation_policy.liquid_reserve: cash and cash equivalents + short-term investments when separately reported
calculation_policy.runway: liquid reserve / annual cash burn when stressed free cash flow is negative; otherwise self-funding
calculation_policy.warning: Scenario outputs are deterministic sensitivities, not management guidance, forecasts, credit ratings, or bankruptcy probabilities.

scenarios.name: 景気後退
scenarios.description: 営業CFを30%減、CapExを15%削減。通常の半導体循環を想定した機械的感応度。

scenarios.name: 深い下振れ
scenarios.description: 営業CFを60%減、CapExを35%削減。需要急減と投資抑制が同時進行するケース。

scenarios.name: 危機
scenarios.description: 営業CFを90%減、CapExを50%削減。資金創出がほぼ停止する極端な感応度。
